positive: A stylized, central composition featuring a flock of whimsical, bioluminescent celestial creatures migrating across a vibrant nebula sky. The creatures should be rendered in clean, graphic silhouettes with soft glowing internal details (ethereal blues, magentas, and golds). The composition should be highly symmetrical and balanced, suitable for a t-shirt graphic. Use a style that merges Art Deco geometry with cosmic watercolor textures. Strong contrast between the deep, velvety black background and the luminous subject matter. Flat vector art quality mixed with deep nebula photographic tones. High detail, clean edges, central subject, poster-quality, suitable for merchandise.
negative: low detail, artifacts, blur, watermark, text, logo, signature, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, distorted, poorly drawn
